title: Farmer's Delight Cutting Compat
description: Adds compatibility between Farmer's Delight and many other mods through cutting board recipes!
body:
**Description:**

This datapack* adds compatability between many mods and Farmer's Delight by adding cutting board recipe support for those mods! Additonally this datapack* works on all versions and loaders of modded minecraft (that have farmers delight of course).

**Important Notice:**

*Keep in mind this is a datpack and not a resourcepack and can be more complicated to install and play with it is suggested to use a mod such as [Paxi](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/paxi) to make it simple.




**Supported Mods:**
- The Aether
- Oh The Biomes We've Gone
- Autumnity
- Buzzier Bees
- Deep Aether
- Deeper and Darker
- Edenring
- Friends and Foes
- Paradise Lost
- Twilight Forest
